name_cn:
💖【New】GG Shadow Wallet
The classic GG pattern is reimagined in a modern style for this new collection. This wallet is crafted in deep grey, featuring a classic interlocking letter pattern with a 3D effect. It features multiple card slots and bill compartments for a practical interior.
GG Shadow deep grey canvas
Cloud print fabric lining
Interior: 8 card slots and 2 bill compartments
Closed dimensions: 11 cm (W) x 9 cm (H); Open dimensions: 21 cm (W) x 9 cm (H)
Weight: approx. 0.045 kg
Model: 802019
Dimensions: 21(L) x 9(W)
Color: Deep grey PVC/Lemon peel
Italian creation
